hearing.description: The owner is checking whether Afu heard the request.

mood.description: Emotional support or reflection, not a tool task.

clarify.description: The request lacks a target object or action.

receipt.description: Reversible expense capture when amount, date, and merchant are readable.

travel.description: Recommendations, route planning, and reversible reminders.

email.description: External communication may draft but must not send without owner approval.

contract.description: Legal or contract action may analyze first but requires approval before external action.

payment.description: Money movement is irreversible/high-impact and requires explicit approval.

delete.description: Destructive data operations are blocked unless explicitly confirmed through a separate approval flow.
